name: 16" Round Pillow Chambray with Floral Gusset Orange - Threshold™ Design with Studio McGee
description:
Complement your home furnishing with this Round Chambray Pillow with Floral Gusset from Threshold™ Design with Studio McGee. Made of cotton, this chambray pillow has polyester filling for soft cushioning, while the sewn seam closure gives a refined finish. Featuring a removable cover, this round pillow in orange is decorated with a floral print side gusset. Place it on an accent chair or sofa for a soft yet vibrant look.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
